## Job description
...
**Customer Technology Product Owner**
...
**Full Time Perm**
...
NiSource is one of the largest fully regulated utility companies in the U.S., serving millions of customers across six states. We’re more than an energy provider—we’re a team committed to innovation, inclusion, and growth. At NiSource, you’ll find a workplace that encourages collaboration, supports professional development, and empowers employees to make an impact.
...
The E-Channels team drives and enhances digital customer experiences across web, mobile, and IVR channels by delivering intuitive, efficient, and customer-focused journeys. We leverage data insights (e.g., CSAT, containment, call drivers) to identify opportunities and prioritize improvements that deliver measurable impact. We collaborate cross-functionally to balance customer needs, technical feasibility, and regulatory requirements while ensuring timely, high-quality delivery.
...
The **Customer Technology Product Owner** will manage key digital channels that enable organizational digital processes and service transactions, utilizing agile methodology to help drive customer engagement within our digital platforms. You will be responsible for projects and processes that optimize the performance of customer self-services, such as IVR, web, mobile app, chatbots, live chat, and alerting systems.
...
* Leads the focus on innovative chat/live chat user experiences across the NiSource footprint.
...
* Assists in testing protocols for web, mobile, IVR, chatbot, alerts, and live chat
...
* Manages updates, improvements and functionality of all NiSource customer-facing Alerts programs, including a broad range of customer-facing messaging.
...
* Assists as backfill for IVR, Web, and mobile app.
...
focus on innovative Out
...
* Facilitates user research and defines application scope and product vision
...
assigned digital channels (Chat & Alerts
...
* Manages metrics for self-service transactions across assigned digital channels, including tracking and completing monthly reporting.
...
* Utilizes agile methodology to drive
...
, incremental change across assigned digital channels.
...
* Facilitates market research to track technology/digital trends and create business cases, championing for technological advances across the NiSource footprint.
...
**Minimum Qualifications **
...
* Bachelor’s degree in Business, IT, Software Engineering or other related field or equivalent work experience
* 4+ years of experience in Project Management
...
* 4+ years of experience in digital operations of IVR, web development, and mobile app
* 4+ years of Agile Methodology
* 5+ years of experience conducting executive leadership presentations
* Expert user with Microsoft Excel, Word, Visio, and PowerPoint
...
**Preferred Qualifications**
* 6+ years of digital customer platform experience (managing customer-facing platforms including websites, chatbots, alerts programs, IVR phone systems or mobile applications).
* Experience with the utility or energy industry
...
The preceding description is not designed to be a complete list of all duties and responsibilities required of the position.

OSU CSE Grader Management System is a web application developed for the Computer Science and Engineering (CSE) department at Ohio State, built using Python and the Django web framework integrated with SQLite. The system was designed to automate the process of assigning students to grader positions for CSE courses. Our team developed an algorithm that assigns graders based on student input, which is collected through an intake form where students provide their information and preferences. The application includes separate views for students, admins, and instructors, allowing them to manage courses, sections, and grader assignments. Throughout the project, I collaborated with a team in an Agile environment, working in sprints to meet project milestones for our sponsor. Show less

### MovieDate | Movie
...
MovieDate is a full-stack web application I developed using the PERN stack (PostgreSQL, Express.js, React, and Node.js). The app simplifies movie planning by allowing users to build personalized movie release calendars and coordinate movie dates with friends. I integrated the TMDB API to pull movie data, including release dates, descriptions, and posters, providing users with up-to-date information. The app is containerized with Docker and deployed on AWS, ensuring scalability and efficient performance. Check out the site here: http://18.222.175.238:3000/ Show less

results.title: UX Research and Design Specialist | Wfh
highlights: 3 days in-office Location: Merrillville, IN, Columbus, OH, Chester, VA, Canonsburg, PA, or Lexington, KY Salary: $82,200 - $123,200 plus 8% annual bonus NiSource is one of the largest fully regulated utility companies in the U.S., serving millions of customers across six states. We’re more than an energy provider—we’re a team committed to innovation, inclusion, and growth. At NiSource, you’ll find a workplace that encourages collaboration, supports professional development, and empowers employees to make an impact. The UX Designer and Researcher at NiSource plays a key role in shaping intuitive, accessible, and data‑driven digital experiences for customers and employees. This role is responsible for understanding Customer VOC needs, defining experience requirements, and translating insights into well‑designed solutions that support NiSource’s commitment to safety, reliability, efficiency, and exceptional customer experience. Working on the Customer Experience team you will work closely with Product Owners from discovery through delivery. This includes conducting user research, mapping customer journeys, developing wireframes and prototypes, validating concepts through usability testing, and ensuring digital products meet usability, accessibility, and regulatory standards. Your responsibilities may include, but are not limited to: • Prioritizes improvements and introduce changes based on value, business impact, effort and risks through user experience testing, and business case research. • Works closely with customers, business partners, field and customer operations teams, and other end-users to understand current state experience needs, user behavior attitudes, and work environments. • Conducts user studies, job shadows, focus groups and interviews to understand user insights. Analyzes research data to define opportunities and recommendations. Develops Personas to define user’s needs. • Maps user experiences across key journeys, documenting personas, touchpoints, pain points, sentiment, processes, stakeholders and key performance indicators. • Designs user experiences that increase safety, efficiency, and employee & customer satisfaction. • Develops storyboards, wireframes and journey maps that inform future state development builds. • Conducts capability demonstrations at key stages within the Agile and Iterative development cycle. • Partners with IT, Change Management, agile development teams and other stakeholders across the organization to translate user insights into experience improvements with detailed requirements; work with project and product management teams to manage experience improvement through design, build, implementation, and sustainment. • Adheres to UI/UX best practices and UI design standards. • Develops and documents design standards to ensure consistency across organization. • Researches, identifies, and shares industry leading UX trends and practices from both inside and outside of utility industry. Experience listed below could be obtained through a combination of school work, classes, research, or any relevant previous job or internship experiences. You must possess the below minimum qualifications to be initially considered for this position. Preferred qualifications are in addition to the minimum requirements and are considered a plus factor in identifying top candidates. Minimum Qualifications • Bachelor's Degree • 2+ years of user research and facilitation experience • 2+ years of experience in interface design and usability testing • Strong knowledge of design thinking methodologies Preferred Qualifications • Working knowledge of Figma, User Testing, Adobe XD, Optimal Workshop, Miro and associated research design and UI prototyping tools Disclaimer This description is not designed to be a complete list of all duties and responsibilities required of the position #NiSource #NowHiring #NIPSCO #HybridJobs #Merrillville #Columbus #Chester #Canonsburg

results.title: James Gerald
highlights:
Director Of Information Technology at [NiSource](https://www.linkedin.com/company/nisource)
...
### Director Of Information Technology at [NiSource](https://www.linkedin.com/company/nisource) (Current)
...
As a visionary IT executive, I lead transformative initiatives that drive innovation, operational efficiency, and strategic growth. I oversee enterprise-wide utility portfolio enhancements, cloud transformations, and mission-critical IT projects, ensuring seamless execution and alignment with business objectives. I set the strategic direction for emerging cloud solutions, leveraging best-in-class implementation practices to optimize scalability and security. My leadership has shaped enterprise cloud operating models and advanced monitoring systems, strengthening IT resilience and performance. With a keen eye for identifying gaps and pioneering solutions, I have played a pivotal role in NiSource’s multi-year IT transformation. My ability to foster a culture of recognition led to the successful implementation of a new IT Recognition program, enhancing team engagement and performance. I have successfully delivered complex technology projects, including OneGIS in Azure and the modernization of outage management systems to Linux using the latest UN data model. I provide strategic thought leadership on IT roadmaps and cloud initiatives while ensuring sound architecture, design, and execution of enterprise solutions. Through agile, waterfall, and iterative methodologies, I have steered software development to meet evolving business needs. My leadership extends to managing service integrators, vendors, and internal stakeholders, prioritizing high-impact initiatives that drive ROI and enhance customer satisfaction. Show less

results.title: Senior AI/ML Engineer at Jobgether - United State | Visa Sponsorship Jobs
highlights:
# Senior AI/ML Engineer
...
We are seeking a highly skilled AI/ML Engineer to develop advanced AI and ML solutions for the energy and utility sector. The ideal candidate will have a strong background in machine learning engineering, AI systems design, and large-scale data-driven decision-making. The role requires collaboration with cross-functional teams to design, build, and deploy scalable machine learning systems.
...
Collaborate with cross-functional teams to design, develop, and deploy scalable AI and machine learning solutions integrated into production systems
...
Build reusable Python libraries and engineering components to support ML pipelines, data processing workflows, and AI system development
...
Python AWS Azure GCP Databricks LangChain LangGraph LlamaIndex Hugging Face AutoGen
...
This position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. We are currently looking for an AI / ML Engineer in the United States.This role sits at the intersection of machine learning engineering, AI systems design, and large-scale data-driven decision-making, focused on solving complex challenges in the energy and utility sector. You will contribute to the development of advanced AI and ML solutions that combine predictive modeling, optimization, and generative AI to support critical infrastructure and sustainability goals. Working closely with data scientists and software engineers, you will help design, build, and deploy scalable machine learning systems that power real-world applications. The environment is highly collaborative and innovation-driven, with a strong emphasis on applied AI, production readiness, and measurable impact. You will work across diverse use cases including forecasting, geospatial analysis, and intelligent decision systems. results.title: Nick Davis
highlights:
Dr. Nick Davis is an AI and Data leader with experience building world-class teams, capturing ideas from collaborative R&D projects, forging and refining via customer feedback through proof of concept (PoC) engagements, and delivering results via deployment of robust, scalable models into customer-facing products and services. He has built and led Data Science teams in healthcare, bioinformatics, and energy. He has over two decades of industry and academic leadership experience in AI/ML, software development and architecture, operations, and research. Dr. Davis is proficient in analyzing large datasets and leveraging AI models across several industries, as well as mining clinical patient datasets to study chronic disease. He has been an invited speaker at regional and national conferences, including ACM SIGKDD Conference on Knowledge, Discovery, and Data Mining (KDD), American Medical Informatics Association Annual Conference, and the Oklahoma Supercomputing Symposium. For his doctoral work, Dr. Davis conducted bioinformatics research in genome-wide association studies (GWAS), SNP-SNP and gene-gene interaction analysis, network centrality, fMRI and brain volumetric data analysis, with results published in Nature Genes and Immunity and other peer-reviewed journals. As an academic research faculty, he collaborated with clinicians to analyze medication adherence and study its impact on chronic disease. He was awarded a Harold Hamm Diabetes Center Enrichment Grant in collaboration with a clinical partner to perform an analysis of sensor-augmented pump therapy data from continuous glucose monitoring of type 1 diabetes pediatric and adolescent patients. As a founding member of an Internet security startup, he was co-inventor of a patented image authentication system that formed the basis of the company's flagship product. He helped lead the company from its inception through R&D and the patent process, to successful launch of several authentication products. Dr. Davis holds BS, MS and PhD degrees in Computer Science from the University of Tulsa.

# Senior AI/ML Engineer (#5402)
...
We are looking for a Senior AI/ML Engineer to join our team!
...
Our client is an innovative technology division within one of the world's top-10 copper producers. The team focuses on leveraging AI, machine learning, and advanced analytics to optimize industrial operations, improve asset reliability, and support data-driven decision-making across global mining and production facilities. The role is focused on building intelligent solutions for predictive maintenance, anomaly detection, and asset performance optimization, helping reduce downtime and improve operational efficiency across large-scale industrial environments.

- Experience with real-time data processing and anomaly detection on streaming platforms (Kafka, Azure Stream Analytics, etc.).

highlights:

...
# Senior Machine Learning Engineer (#5343)
...
N-iX is a global software development service company that helps businesses across the globe create next-generation software products. Founded in 2002, we unite 2,400+ tech-savvy professionals across 40+ countries, working on impactful projects for industry leaders and Fortune 500 companies. Our expertise spans cloud, data, AI/ML, embedded software, IoT, and more, driving digital transformation across finance, manufacturing, telecom, healthcare, and other industries. Join N-iX and become part of a team where your ideas make a real impact.
...
We are looking for a Senior Machine Learning Engineer to lead the development and deployment of advanced AI models. In this role, you will be responsible for the end-to-end lifecycle of our machine learning systems, from architectural design and data preprocessing to model training, optimization, and production deployment.
...
You will work at the intersection of generative AI and traditional machine learning, building the engines that power two strategic AI initiatives spanning NLP-based document intelligence and predictive analytics. Operating within a structured agile delivery model with formal review gates, you will ensure our models are not just accurate, but also robust, explainable, and deployable within highly secure, on-premise environments.
...
1. LLM & NLP Pipelines
...
- Design and fine-tune Large Language Model (LLM) pipelines to interpret complex regulatory texts (e.g. standards, building codes) and extract structured rules.
...
- Convert natural language requirements into computer-processable formats (e.g., logic tuples) that can be executed by downstream compliance engines.
...
- Implement RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) architectures to enable semantic querying of technical documentation and historical project data.
...
- Optimize prompt strategies (few-shot learning, chain-of-thought) to improve model performance on domain-specific tasks without extensive retraining.
...
1. MLOps & Productionization
...
- Containerize models using Docker/Kubernetes and deploy them into secure, on-premise inference environments.
...
- Build automated training and inference pipelines using tools like Kubeflow or MLflow to ensure reproducibility and scalability.
...
Requirements:
...
- 5+ years of experience in Machine Learning Engineering, with a proven track record of deploying models into production environments.
...
- Expert proficiency in Python and standard ML libraries (PyTorch, TensorFlow, Scikit-learn, Pandas, NumPy).
...
- Strong experience with transformer architectures (BERT, GPT, Llama) and NLP frameworks (Hugging Face, LangChain).
...
- Proficiency with MLOps tools and practices, including containerization (Docker), orchestration (Kubernetes), and experiment tracking (MLflow).
...
- Ability to design data preprocessing pipelines for both structured (SQL, tabular) and unstructured (text, PDF) data.
...
- Strong grasp of algorithmic principles for implementing custom logic, such as graph traversal or geometric computations.
...
- Ability to quickly learn and apply ML techniques to specialized domains like engineering, supply chain, or other highly regulated industries.
...
and documentation requirements.
...
- Strong communication skills to work effectively with Data Scientists, Backend Engineers, and Domain Experts to align technical solutions with business needs.
...
You will be building the intelligence that drives critical enterprise infrastructure. Your models will not just generate text or predictions; they will directly influence the design of complex industrial systems and the resilience of supply chains. If you are ready to apply advanced ML to tangible, high-stakes problems in a rigorous engineering environment, join us.

results.title: Optum Hiring Data Scientist | Jobformore
highlights:
Optum Hiring Data Scientist | Jobformore
...
# Data Scientist
...
Optum is seeking a Data Science professional who is passionate about applying machine learning, Generative AI, and Large Language Models (LLMs) to solve complex healthcare problems on a scale. Imagine working with massive volumes of healthcare data spanning clinical, claims, behavioral, and digital interactions – powering intelligent personalization, discovery, and decision support for millions of members, providers, and care teams.
...
At Optum, the Data Science mission is to transform healthcare data into robust, scalable AI solutions, including LLM based and Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) systems that combine enterprise knowledge with advanced language models to deliver accurate, contextual, and trustworthy insights. These solutions help uncover deep usage patterns, member journeys, and care signals that inform and continuously evolve Optum’s digital products, clinical platforms, and healthcare services.
...
Your work will directly influence how healthcare consumers engage with digital experiences, how clinicians access timely insights, and how business and care strategies are shaped through data. By joining Optum’s data science team, you will be part of an exciting journey to build advanced ML and GenAI driven products, grounded in responsible AI principles, that operate at enterprise scale and create meaningful impact across the healthcare ecosystem.
...
- Design, develop, and deploy advanced analytics, machine learning, and Generative AI solutions to address complex healthcare and business problems using largescale structured and unstructured data
...
- Applies advanced techniques including statistics, machine learning, simulation, and mathematical modelling
...
- Build and optimize LLM based applications, including Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) frameworks, to enable accurate, context aware, and explainable insights from enterprise healthcare data sources such as clinical notes, claims, provider data, and policy documents
...
- Develop, evaluate, and finetune machine learning and GenAI models, including prompt engineering, retrieval strategies, and model evaluation techniques to improve accuracy, relevance, and performance
...
- Translate complex analytical and GenAI outputs into
...
, actionable insights for business stakeholders, product teams, and
...
- Support prototyping, validation, and deployment of GenAI and ML solutions, working with engineering teams to ensure solutions are scalable, secure, and maintainable. Continuously stay current with advancements in LLMs, GenAI frameworks, and healthcare AI trends, contributing innovative ideas and improvements to Optum’s capabilities
...
### Required Qualifications:
...
- Bachelor’s Degree (preferably in information technology, engineering, math, computer science, analytics, engineering or other related field)
...
- 4+ years of experience in handling/active development in data science projects
...
- 4+ years of experience in Microsoft Azure Cloud, Databricks, Mlflow, Spark SQL & Python
...
- Experience using Machine Learning Algorithms: Linear & Logistic Regression, Time Series analysis, Support Vector Machine, K-Means clustering, K-Nearest Neighbors Decision Trees, Random Forest, Naive Bayes, PCA, SVD, Artificial Neural Networks, Association Rules, Genetic Algorithm, Optimization, Bagging and Boosting algorithms etc.
...
- Understanding of data, schema, data model, machine learning and how to bring efficiency in big data related life cycle
...
- Proven skills to create opportunities using machine learning or artificial intelligence
...
Optum, part of UnitedHealth
...
, is a global health
...
and technology company revolutionizing healthcare delivery through data analytics,

Prairie, Minnesota, Optum serves patients, providers, payers, and pharmacies worldwide with innovative platforms for care optimization, claims processing, and population health management.
